description: E-commerce web application with Angular frontend, Express.js REST API backend, SQLite database, user authentication with JWT tokens, file upload functionality, payment processing with credit card storage, user reviews and feedback system, admin panel with role-based access control, password reset via email, product search with filtering

vulnerabilities.name: SQL Injection in search
vulnerabilities.description: Product search endpoint vulnerable to SQL injection via crafted search terms

vulnerabilities.name: Broken Authentication
vulnerabilities.description: Multiple auth bypasses including password brute force and JWT manipulation

vulnerabilities.name: Cross-Site Scripting (XSS)
vulnerabilities.description: Reflected and stored XSS in product reviews and user profile fields

vulnerabilities.name: Sensitive Data Exposure
vulnerabilities.description: Passwords stored with weak hashing, credit card data exposed in API responses

vulnerabilities.name: Broken Access Control
vulnerabilities.description: Horizontal and vertical privilege escalation, IDOR on user data endpoints

vulnerabilities.name: Security Misconfiguration
vulnerabilities.description: Verbose error messages, exposed stack traces, default credentials

vulnerabilities.name: Insecure File Upload
vulnerabilities.description: Unrestricted file upload allows arbitrary file types including executables

vulnerabilities.name: XML External Entity (XXE)
vulnerabilities.description: XXE via crafted XML payloads in file upload or API endpoints

vulnerabilities.name: Insecure Deserialization
vulnerabilities.description: Unsafe deserialization of user-controlled data leading to RCE

vulnerabilities.name: JWT Token Manipulation
vulnerabilities.description: JWT none algorithm attack, weak secret allowing token forgery

vulnerabilities.name: Cross-Site Request Forgery
vulnerabilities.description: Missing CSRF tokens on state-changing operations

vulnerabilities.name: Privacy Violation - User Tracking
vulnerabilities.description: User activities tracked and correlated without consent or transparency

vulnerabilities.name: Denial of Service via Resource Exhaustion
vulnerabilities.description: No rate limiting on API endpoints allows resource exhaustion
